initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS oldest_sjs_lab_date, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS lab_date, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m%d', 'now') < strftime('%m%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age_at_admission
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS oldest_sjs_lab_date,
    CAST((julianday(Patient."First Date") - julianday(Patient.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS oldest_sjs_lab_date, (strftime('%Y', Patient.First Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', Patient.First Date) < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age_at_admission
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(Laboratory.Date) AS oldest_sjs_lab_date, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Patient.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;
